title: SRS Package Manifest (ext:repository)
description: Index manifest for a local file-based SRS package. Declares identity, lists relative paths to field, type, view, and relation-type definition files, and records dependency references to other packages. Governs the package/ directory layout within an ext:repository.

id.description: Stable UUID for this package. Never changes across versions.

name.description: Machine-readable package name within the namespace, kebab-case.

description.description: What this package provides and who it is for.

fields.description: Relative paths from this package directory to field definition files, e.g. fields/title.json.

types.description: Relative paths from this package directory to type definition files.

views.description: Relative paths from this package directory to L1 View definition files (ext:views-l1). Omit or use empty array if the package defines no Views.

documentViews.description: ext:views-l2 — relative paths from this package directory to DocumentView definition files. Omit if the package defines no DocumentViews.

themes.description: ext:themes-l1 — relative paths from this package directory to Theme definition files. Omit if the package defines no Themes.

relationTypes.description: Relative paths from this package directory to relation-type definition files. Omit if the package defines no relation types.

vocabularies.description: Relative paths from this package directory to Vocabulary definition files (RFC-006).

lifecycles.description: Relative paths from this package directory to Lifecycle definition files (RFC-006).

dependencyRefs.description: Other packages this package depends on. Consumers must resolve these before using this package.

version.description: Semver version of the depended-upon package.
